policy.title: Policies
policy.subtitle: Gatekeeper Constraints and Kyverno policies, and the resources they enforce. Read-only — KubeAtlas observes the policy engines, it does not edit policies.
policy.empty: No policy constraints found. Install Gatekeeper or Kyverno and apply a policy to see it here.

topology.title: Topology
topology.placeholder: Cytoscape graph at cluster / namespace / workload levels.

snapshots.title: Snapshots
snapshots.subtitle: What changed in the cluster across a time window — added, removed, or modified resources from the append-only event stream.
snapshots.notEnabled: Snapshots are not enabled on this server. They require Tier 2 (PostgreSQL) with snapshots.enabled=true in the Helm chart.
snapshots.timelineEmpty: No snapshot markers yet — the first one lands at the configured fullSyncSchedule.

search.title: Search
search.placeholder: Cross-namespace resource search — coming alongside the resources page.

docs.intro: The full KubeAtlas docs — quick start, architecture, roadmap, developer guide — live at:

list.empty: No resources match the current filter.

overlay.hint: Overlay observed runtime calls (CALLS_AT_RUNTIME) inferred from OpenTelemetry traces. Requires otel.enabled on a Tier 2 server.
